title: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems
summary: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems retrieves prior skills in an original independent multivariable responsive diagnosis scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply responsive mobile first, responsive content breakpoints, responsive media queries, responsive images, responsive embedded media, responsive container queries, responsive test matrix in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real independent multivariable responsive diagnosis artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Accessible Resource Inventory responsive-system work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the Accessible Resource Inventory responsive-system work here. */

steps.title: 01 · answer 1: resource inventory narrow-layout baseline · quiz
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 1: Which claim survives the changed case? Scenario: independent multivariable responsive diagnosis.
steps.why: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 1 in independent multivariable responsive diagnosis.

content.title: independent multivariable responsive diagnosis evidence
content.text: For Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems, choose the responsive mobile first claim that preserves the independent multivariable responsive diagnosis purpose, native behavior, and understandable relationships when presentation changes.

hints: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 1: identify the user task and data relationship first.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 1: compare source, native behavior, and announced meaning.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 1: make the smallest repair that preserves earlier passing work.

options.text: Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 1: mobile first means targeting one standard phone width and adding desktop overrides later.
Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 1: make the unqueried base complete at constrained widths, then layer enhancements from observed content needs without removing tasks.
Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 1: hide secondary table columns on phones because narrow layouts need less information.

content.text: Order the independent multivariable responsive diagnosis work by dependency and verify that each phase creates evidence needed by the next.

hints: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 2: identify the user task and data relationship first.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 2: compare source, native behavior, and announced meaning.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 2: make the smallest repair that preserves earlier passing work.

options.text: independent multivariable responsive diagnosis phase 2.1: resize and zoom the real content continuously
independent multivariable responsive diagnosis phase 2.2: record the exact collision wrap or task failure
independent multivariable responsive diagnosis phase 2.3: add one minimal query at the content threshold
independent multivariable responsive diagnosis phase 2.4: test below at and above the boundary with changed content

steps.title: 03 · inspect 3: inventory environment and input capability adaptation · quiz

content.title: independent multivariable responsive diagnosis evidence
content.text: For Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems, choose the responsive media queries claim that preserves the independent multivariable responsive diagnosis purpose, native behavior, and understandable relationships when presentation changes.

hints: Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 3: identify the user task and data relationship first.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 3: compare source, native behavior, and announced meaning.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 3: make the smallest repair that preserves earlier passing work.

options.text: Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 3: viewport width is the only useful responsive condition and hover proves mouse use.
Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 3: keep essential behavior in the base, then use range, capability, and preference queries only for safe enhancements.
Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 3: place action labels only inside hover rules because desktops support hover.

Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 4: compare source, native behavior, and announced meaning.
Mastery Exam: Responsive Systems checkpoint 4: make the smallest repair that preserves earlier passing work.

options.text: Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 4: setting max-width one hundred percent prevents an oversized image download.

Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 4: combine intrinsic dimensions, fluid rendering, truthful sizes, candidate sources, and purpose-driven alternative text; use picture only when format or composition changes.
Independent multivariable responsive diagnosis case 4: describe every pixel in alt text because responsive crops change the image dimensions.
